sessionStart.prompt: Silently read learning-state/progress.md (only). In <=5 lines, greet me with: my current Stage and Week, my last activity date, and ONE concrete suggested next action (defer to the roadmap-navigator skill's logic). End with: 'Say "what's next" for a full plan, "dashboard" for full status, or just start working.' Do not invoke any other skills; this is orientation only.

stop.prompt: Check learning-state/journal.md for an entry dated today. If there is no entry for today AND this session had >5 tool calls (substantive work), append ONE line to your final response: '(tip: run `/log today` to journal this session)'. Otherwise add nothing. Do not invoke any skills.
